queries.q: Draft the agenda for Tuesday's cross-functional kickoff, with time-boxed topics and owners
We have a 45-minute decision meeting on pricing; build the structure so we actually decide something
Put together the agenda for the quarterly planning session, ten attendees, ninety minutes
I'm chairing the stakeholder review next week; give me the topics, owners, and time allocation
Set up the working-session agenda for the design sprint kickoff
We keep running long on the weekly sync; rebuild the agenda with tighter timeboxes
Prepare the exec-briefing agenda for the board update next Thursday
This is a brainstorm session for onboarding ideas; structure it so it doesn't turn into a status meeting
Build the 1-on-1 agenda template for my new report's first check-in
We need a fresh structure for the recurring team sync so it doesn't feel stale
That roadmap review already happened this morning; write up what we decided
queries.notes: The meeting has already happened, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Summarize yesterday's planning meeting with the decisions and action owners
I need private prep before tomorrow's tense negotiation with the vendor: stakes, positions, and my ask
queries.notes: Private tactical prep, not a shared attendee agenda, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Help me get ready for a first meeting with a skeptical new stakeholder, what to say and how to read the room
Write the update for the teams who weren't in the room about what we decided in planning
queries.notes: Communicating outcomes to non-attendees, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Why does this Redis connection pool exhaust under load?
Write a shell script that rotates log files older than 30 days
Recommend a beginner-friendly hiking trail near Denver
